title: Optional Pi monitor overlay adapter
goal: Add an optional Pi package extension that renders Khazad-Doom progress inside Pi by consuming the same CLI/daemon progress interface used by the harness-neutral monitor.
acceptance: The repository is a Pi package that declares the existing skill and the optional Khazad-Doom monitor extension without requiring the extension for core CLI monitoring.
The extension registers /khazad-monitor with run-id and latest modes, opens a Pi TUI overlay in TUI mode, and renders run/progress/event/output-tail fields from khazad-doom status JSON.
Closing the Pi overlay with q or Esc only closes the monitor and never cancels the daemon-owned run.
Non-TUI or unavailable-khazad cases degrade to clear notifications or text commands instead of throwing noisy stack traces.
Extension syntax is checked and docs explain how to install/enable it as an optional Pi adapter.
must_ask_if: The implementation would add Khazad-Doom's Pi extension to global user settings automatically or make it mandatory for non-Pi harnesses.
